TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: a tja kineljang aicu a venarung ta kai a pakasaseljangan (sinipapukeljang a linguistic relativity nua kai nua amilika) mavan a sipapukeljang tjanu itjen tu maljian a sipualang tua kacauan nua caucau nu maljian a sikaljavaran niamadju. izua uta sipapungadan nua kangadanan ni sapir (Edward Sapir) a kisanvenarung tua sasusuan nua kai kati wuv (Benjamin Lee Whorf) a situ nimadju mavan a sapir-wuv a sinivarungan (Sapir‚ÄďWhorf hypothesis) a tja siaya tuaza venarungan sakamaya, inika penaqulid tiamadju a pasemalav taza venarungan. a tja mapacunan tua cinalivatan nuazua venarung ta kai a pakasaseljangan aicu, mamasukaikai itjen tua matjaliaw a sinitjaucikelan nu paqayam itjen a pualang tuazua sinanvarungan. == kasizuan ==
S.PHON: a ¶a kin…ô éaŇč ai ¶u a v…ônaruŇč ta kai a pakasas…ô éaŇčan (sinipapuk…ô éaŇč a …≠iŇčuisti ¶ r…ô…≠ativitj nua kai nua ami…≠ika) mavan a sipapuk…ô éaŇč ¶anu i ¶…ôn tu ma éian a sipua…≠aŇč tua ka ¶auan nua ¶au ¶au nu ma éian a sika éavaran niama…Ču. izua uta sipapuŇčadan nua kaŇčadanan ni sapir (…ôdward sapir) a kisanv…ônaruŇč tua sasusuan nua kai kati wuv (b…ônjamin …≠…ô…ô whur*) a situ nima…Ču mavan a sapir-wuv a sinivaruŇčan (sapir*whur* hjputh…ôsis) a ¶a siaja tuaza v…ônaruŇčan sakamaja, inika p…ônaqu…≠id tiama…Ču a pas…ôma…≠av taza v…ônaruŇčan. a ¶a mapa ¶unan tua ¶ina…≠ivatan nuazua v…ônaruŇč ta kai a pakasas…ô éaŇčan ai ¶u, mamasukaikai i ¶…ôn tua ma ¶a…≠iaw a sini ¶au ¶ik…ô…≠an nu paqajam i ¶…ôn a pua…≠aŇč tuazua sinanvaruŇčan. == kasizuan ==
S.FORM: a tja kineljang aicu a venarung ta kai a pakasaseljangan (sinipapukeljang a linguistic relativity nua kai nua amilika) mavan a sipapukeljang tjanu itjen tu maljian a sipualang tua kacauan nua caucau nu maljian a sikaljavaran niamadju. izua uta sipapungadan nua kangadanan ni sapir (Edward Sapir) a kisanvenarung tua sasusuan nua kai kati wuv (Benjamin Lee Whorf) a situ nimadju mavan a sapir-wuv a sinivarungan (Sapir‚ÄďWhorf hypothesis) a tja siaya tuaza venarungan sakamaya, inika penaqulid tiamadju a pasemalav taza venarungan. a tja mapacunan tua cinalivatan nuazua venarung ta kai a pakasaseljangan aicu, mamasukaikai itjen tua matjaliaw a sinitjaucikelan nu paqayam itjen a pualang tuazua sinanvarungan. == kasizuan ==
S.PHON: a ¶a kin…ô éaŇč ai ¶u a v…ônaruŇč ta kai a pakasas…ô éaŇčan (sinipapuk…ô éaŇč a …≠iŇčuisti ¶ r…ô…≠ativitj nua kai nua ami…≠ika) mavan a sipapuk…ô éaŇč ¶anu i ¶…ôn tu ma éian a sipua…≠aŇč tua ka ¶auan nua ¶au ¶au nu ma éian a sika éavaran niama…Ču. izua uta sipapuŇčadan nua kaŇčadanan ni sapir (…ôdward sapir) a kisanv…ônaruŇč tua sasusuan nua kai kati wuv (b…ônjamin …≠…ô…ô whur*) a situ nima…Ču mavan a sapir-wuv a sinivaruŇčan (sapir*whur* hjputh…ôsis) a ¶a siaja tuaza v…ônaruŇčan sakamaja, inika p…ônaqu…≠id tiama…Ču a pas…ôma…≠av taza v…ônaruŇčan. a ¶a mapa ¶unan tua ¶ina…≠ivatan nuazua v…ônaruŇč ta kai a pakasas…ô éaŇčan ai ¶u, mamasukaikai i ¶…ôn tua ma ¶a…≠iaw a sini ¶au ¶ik…ô…≠an nu paqajam i ¶…ôn a pua…≠aŇč tuazua sinanvaruŇčan. == kasizuan ==
